title: Google Drive API access denied error
symptom: When attempting to upload a file to Google Drive, n8n returns a 403 error indicating access is denied. This prevents the workflow from completing successfully.
not_this_if: API is enabled for the Google account
Using a version of n8n newer than 0.156.0
root_cause: The 403 error typically occurs when the Google Drive API is not enabled for the Google account being used. This can happen if the necessary permissions are not granted or if the API has not been activated in the Google Cloud Console.
fix_steps: Go to the Google Cloud Console
Search for 'Google Drive API' and enable it
agent_instruction: Enable the Google Drive API in the Google Cloud Console for your project.
